Contact Me

If you are a Stroud constituent and would like to contact me about an issue or a query, please email me directly, use the form below, or call 01453 621304 to speak to a member of my constituency office team.

Due to strict parliamentary protocol, I am only able to deal with casework from Stroud constituents. As a general rule I do not sign mass letters or petitions unless they relate to an area of expertise or particular interest. If I am going to commit to a cause, I want to do it properly.

You can check who your MP is here.

Please include any relevant case reference numbers in any written communication.

Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form.
Address
